mission.title: dragonfly: Healthcheck in DragonFly v1.22.0 is failing
mission.description: Healthcheck in DragonFly v1.22.0 is failing. Community-reported issue.

steps.title: Identify dragonfly troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your dragonfly deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n dragonfly -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dragonfly
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dragonfly -n dragonfly --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review dragonfly configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant dragonfly configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n dragonfly -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dragonfly
kubectl get configmap -n dragonfly -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=dragonfly
```
The `healthcheck.sh` in v1.22.0 is not returning healthy

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Run v1.22.0 in EKS
2.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Healthcheck in DragonFly v1.22.0 is failing
steps.description:
as a workaround you can pass  the port you are using like this:
`docker run -e HEALTHCHECK_PORT=6379 --read-only --group-add 999  --cap-drop=ALL --user 999  --rm docker.dragonflydb.io/dragonflydb/dragonfly:v1.22.2`
```yaml
Active Internet connections (only servers)
Proto Recv-Q Send-Q Local Address           Foreign Address         State       PID/Program name    
tcp        0      0 0.0.0.0:6379            0.0.0.0:*               LISTEN      -
```

steps.title: Confirm Healthcheck in DragonFly v1.22.0 is failing is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dragonfly -n dragonfly --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n dragonfly --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
as a workaround you can pass  the port you are using like this:
`docker run -e HEALTHCHECK_PORT=6379 --read-only --group-add 999  --cap-drop=ALL --user 999  --rm docker.dragonflydb.io/dragonflydb/dragonfly:v1.22.2`

Proto Recv-Q Send-Q Local Address           Foreign Address         State       PID/Program name    
tcp        0      0 0.0.0.0:6379            0.0.0.0:*               LISTEN      -

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with dragonfly installed or the issue environment reproducible.
